providerNotifications: New side effects from recent injection
New abnormal involuntary movements, excessive sedation, dizziness, agitation, delirium, fever, tachycardia, abnormal blood pressure, or any concerning symptoms

idealSteps: The Abilify Maintena injection is not due. Please consult guidance on early dosing.
Administer usual Abilify Maintena monthly dose
Arrange for next usual monthly dose in 4 weeks
Administer usual Abilify Maintena monthly dose

Notify patient of the options recommended for reinitiation: either (a) receive a 2nd Abilify Maintena dose at the same time as the first dose or within days, or (b) resume oral aripiprazole (10-20 mg) for 14 days
pragmaticVariations: If the patient is not able or likely to take oral aripiprazole or get a 2nd injection immediately, consult with provider about accelerating timing of next injection.
providerNotifications: Post-injection: notify provider of situation and need for either a 2nd immediate monthly injection or 14 days of oral aripiprazole.
